authority_name: Ministry of Land, Infrastructure, Transport and Tourism of Japan
attribution: National Land Numerical Information (Highway Time Series, N06-2025), Ministry of Land, Infrastructure, Transport and Tourism of Japan
transformation_disclosure: Kaido Routes used only current-state records (end year 9999), filtered designated urban expressway features whose route name begins with 首都高速, retained complete and provisional-use geometries without vertex simplification, and projected JGD2011 EPSG:6668 coordinates into a north-up local equirectangular normalized display space. The result is geographic context only and has no direction, legal-movement, RoutePlan, or realtime authority.
